zh.Dudley, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利
zh.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: 英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dudley Esq.於大約1430年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Sir John Dudley alias Sutton31歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Berkeley32歲。他於1460年之前與Elizabeth Bramshott在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年2月6日在英國素可可林平享年72歲，埋葬在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素。

zh-hans.Dudley, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利
zh-hans.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: 英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dudley Esq.于大约1430年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Sir John Dudley alias Sutton31岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Berkeley32岁。他于1460年之前与Elizabeth Bramshott在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年2月6日在英国素可可林平享年72岁，埋葬在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Dudley Esq. was born about 1430, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, was 32. He married Elizabeth Bramshott before 1460, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 February 1501, in Clymping, Sussex, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dudley Esq. est né environ 1430, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bramshott avant 1460, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 février 1501, à Clymping, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Dudley Esq. um 1430 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dudley alias Sutton 31 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Berkeley 32. Er hat vor 1460 in England Elizabeth Bramshott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Februar 1501 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Clymping, Sussex, England und wurde in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Dudley Esq. è nato il circa 1430 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bramshott prima del 1460, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1501, nel Clymping, Sussex, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Arundel Castle, Sussex, England.

ja.Clymping, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスクリンパング
ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Dudley, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリー
ja.Atherington, Devon, England: イギリスデボンアスエリントン
ja.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスアルンデル カストル
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: John Dudley Esq.が約1430年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Dudley alias Suttonは31歳，母Lady Elizabeth Berkeleyは32歳であった。1460年以前にイギリスでElizabeth Bramshottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年2月6日にイギリススセックスクリンパングで72歳で死去し，イギリススセックスアルンデル カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dudley Esq.(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dudley alias Sutton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Berkeley(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1460년 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth Bramshott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 2월 6일 영국 수세스 클림핀그에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에 묻혔다.

mn.Dudley, Staffordshire, England: Dudley, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Dudley Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bramshott antes 1460, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1501, em Clymping, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dudley Esq. родился около 1430 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Dudley alias Sutton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bramshott перед 1460 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 февраля 1501 г. в местности климпинг, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия.

sm.from 1484 to 1485: mai le 1484 e o'o I le 1485

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Dudley Esq. nació aproximadamente 1430, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bramshott antes de 1460, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1501, en Clymping, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra.
